text:
There once was a timid kitten named Whiskers who lived with his loving owner, Mrs. Jenkins. Whiskers was known far and wide for his timid meows, his love of soft blankets, and his constant companion, a tiny golden bug that lived inside his ear.

One cold winter day, Mrs. Jenkins decided to go on a little vacation, leaving Whiskers at home all alone. As the nights grew long and lonely, Whiskers felt a curious itch under his ear. Eagerly, he scratched it—and out popped the tiny golden bug. Laughter bubbled up from the tiny creature, flitting from ear to ear. The bug spoke!

"You look lonely! What would you like to hear about?"

"I read some tales of dragons," Whiskers confessed. "Do you think there are kind dragons?"

The bug flicked its wings thoughtfully. "In your stories, the dragons are mostly bad? They gobble up townsfolk?"
